name: full-stack-development
description: A Codex full-stack development workflow for project-fixed requirements, stage gates, backend/frontend planning, HeroUI front ends, implementation, and verification.

interface.shortDescription: Create fixed full-stack requirement workspaces and gated HeroUI front ends.
interface.longDescription: Adds a reusable Codex full-stack workflow with a top-level Skill, local MCP tools, and the official HeroUI React MCP server. It requires a fixed project requirement workspace, stage tracking, requirement-change regression, backend/frontend contracts, official HeroUI component mapping, Pencil or Figma component-detail images, and user approval before front-end implementation.
defaultPrompt: Use 全栈开发 to clarify and plan this product before implementation.
Create the fixed full-stack requirement workspace for this feature.
Plan backend, data, API, frontend, HeroUI visual approval, and verification gates.
Review this implementation against the full-stack stage contract.
